expectations.text: The response defaults to Solana without needing to ask the user
expectations.evidence: Without skill, Claude redirected to pump.fun, DEX Screener, and trading terminals. No Solana default applied.

expectations.text: The response does NOT ask the user which chain they want for a basic trenches scan
expectations.evidence: Did not ask for chain — but only because it redirected to manual tools rather than using onchainos.

expectations.text: The response uses memepump tokens command with stage NEW
expectations.evidence: No onchainos commands used. Purely advisory with external site references.
